decisions.decision: Skylark 1.0 ships as a one-time purchase at 6 USD; no subscription and no freemium tier at launch.
decisions.reason: 16 of 21 survey respondents preferred paying once, the median acceptable price was 5-7 USD, and one SKU keeps launch support simple.

decisions.decision: Skylark 1.0 launches on 2026-06-26, with store submission by the 2026-06-24 cutoff.
options: Launch 2026-06-26 inside the current store window
Slip one week to 2026-07-03 for extra polish
decisions.reason: Round-one playtest found no launch blockers and the readiness review confirmed the proof package; slipping only stretches the crunch.

decisions.decision: The beta community runs on a self-hosted forum instead of a hosted chat service.
options: Hosted chat service with invite links
decisions.reason: Matches the local-first story, keeps tester feedback under studio control, and threads digest better into weekly support themes.

decisions.decision: ridgeline.example stays a static site generated from the docs repo; no CMS before v1.1.
options: Static site from the docs repo
Hosted CMS with an editor UI
decisions.recommendation: Static site from the docs repo
decisions.reason: Two people cannot babysit a CMS during launch week; static output keeps the changelog automation path (TASK-062) simple.

decisions.decision: Support SLA for launch week: first reply within 24 hours on every ticket.
options: Best effort with office hours only
decisions.reason: Week-26 volume was handled inside 24 hours with two people; macros and office hours should absorb the launch spike, but the commitment is not locked yet.

decisions.decision: Keep the current licensed weather provider as primary with the cached fallback; defer any second provider to v1.1.
options: Add a second provider before launch
decisions.reason: The fallback cache (TASK-022) covered every outage in beta; integrating a second provider now adds risk during the freeze.
